task_completion.description: Agent successfully logs into the OpenEMR system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenEMR dashboard, calendar, or main navigation interface is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the Reports menu and locates the Financial section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Reports' menu is expanded or clicked, showing 'Financial' options, or the agent is navigating through the Reports hierarchy.

task_completion.description: Agent selects and loads the 'Day Sheet' report interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Day Sheet' link is clicked or the specific Day Sheet parameter screen is loaded (page title often indicates 'Day Sheet').

task_completion.description: Agent initiates the report generation for the current date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Agent clicks a 'Submit', 'Generate', or 'Print' button. The date field should show today's date or the default current date.

task_completion.description: The Day Sheet report is successfully displayed with required financial columns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A report table is visible in the browser containing specific financial columns such as 'Charges', 'Payments', and 'Adjustments'.

integrity.description: Agent interacts with the OpenEMR web interface directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser displaying OpenEMR, not a terminal, command line, or code editor.

integrity.description: Agent generates the report dynamically rather than typing results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report appears as a rendered HTML table or PDF within the OpenEMR interface, not text manually typed into a notepad or text field.

integrity.description: The actions occur within the OpenEMR application context.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar or page header indicates an OpenEMR instance.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct navigation path is Reports > Financial > Day Sheet. The generated report must display a table with columns for 'Charges', 'Payments', and 'Adjustments'.
